features.name: Metamagic
features.description: You gain the ability to shape your spells as they are being cast. See the Metamagic table below for options.

features.name: Cantrips Known (3)
features.description: You know three cantrips of your choice from the Sorcerer spell list.

features.name: Arcane Recovery
features.description: You can use your sorcery points to regain hit dice. See the Arcane Recovery table below for details.

features.name: Metamagic - Quickened Spell
features.description: As a bonus action, you can spend two sorcery points to cast a spell you know with the quickened metamagic option.

features.name: Metamagic - Heightened Spell
features.description: You can use a level 1 or higher spell slot to cast a spell of that same level using the heightened metamagic option. You must then spend an additional sorcery point for each extra level above 1.

features.name: Sorcerous Origin: Draconic Bloodline
features.description: You choose one type of dragon as your draconic ancestry, gaining certain abilities related to that dragon’s traits.

features.name: Metamagic - Subtle Spell
features.description: When you cast a spell with this metamagic option, it can't be dispelled or countered unless the caster uses an action to do so.

features.name: Improved Metamagic
features.description: Choose one metamagic option. It no longer costs sorcery points to use that option when casting a spell at your level or lower. You must then spend two sorcery points for each extra level above your level when using the chosen option.

features.name: Metamagic - Twinned Spell
features.description: You can cast a spell that targets only one creature and then choose another creature within range to be targeted by the spell’s effect. The second target must be within 30 feet of the first target and must also be a creature.

features.name: Sorcerous Origin Feature: Dragon Magic
features.description: You gain new abilities depending on your draconic ancestry. For example, you might gain resistance to fire damage if you chose the dragon type that breathes fire.

features.name: Metamagic - Heightened Spell (2)
features.description: You can use a level 3 or higher spell slot to cast a spell of that same level using the heightened metamagic option. You must then spend three sorcery points for each extra level above 3.

features.name: Sorcerous Secret: Eldritch Invocation
features.description: Choose an eldritch invocation from the Sorcerer class's list, and you gain its benefits.

features.name: Hit Points
features.description: Hit Id6 sorcerer levei Dice: per Hit + Constitution modifier Points at 1st Levei: 6 your Hit + Leveis: Id6 (or 4) your Points Higher Constitution modifier sorcerer after

features.name: Proficiencies
features.description: Armor: None Weapons: darts, Daggers, slings, light crossbows Tools: quarterstaffs, Skills: two Arcana, Choose from Insight, Deception, Persuasion, Religion
